mission.title: Install and Configure Sermant on Kubernetes
mission.description: Sermant is a proxyless service mesh based on Java bytecode enhancement technology, designed to provide service governance capabilities in microservices architectures. Installing Sermant allows you to enhance your Java applications with governance features without modifying their source code.

steps.title: Download Sermant release
steps.description:
Download the Sermant agent package:
```bash
curl -Lo sermant-2.0.0.tar.gz https://github.com/sermant-io/Sermant/releases/download/v2.0.0/sermant-2.0.0.tar.gz
tar xzf sermant-2.0.0.tar.gz
```

steps.title: Start ZooKeeper (configuration center)
steps.description:
Sermant uses ZooKeeper for dynamic configuration:
```bash
# Download ZooKeeper
curl -Lo apache-zookeeper-3.8.4-bin.tar.gz https://dlcdn.apache.org/zookeeper/zookeeper-3.8.4/apache-zookeeper-3.8.4-bin.tar.gz
tar xzf apache-zookeeper-3.8.4-bin.tar.gz
cp apache-zookeeper-3.8.4-bin/conf/zoo_sample.cfg apache-zookeeper-3.8.4-bin/conf/zoo.cfg
apache-zookeeper-3.8.4-bin/bin/zkServer.sh start
```

steps.title: Attach Sermant to your Java application
steps.description:
Add the Sermant agent to your Java application's JVM arguments:
```bash
java -javaagent:sermant-agent-2.0.0/agent/sermant-agent.jar=appName=your-app -jar your-app.jar
```

steps.title: Verify Sermant is attached
steps.description:
Start the Sermant Backend to monitor the agent:
```bash
java -jar sermant-agent-2.0.0/server/sermant/sermant-backend-2.0.0.jar
```
Access the dashboard at http://localhost:8900

uninstall.title: Remove Sermant from your application
uninstall.description: Remove the `-javaagent` flag from your JVM arguments and restart the application.

upgrade.title: Download latest Sermant release
upgrade.description:
Check https://github.com/sermant-io/Sermant/releases for the latest version:
```bash
curl -Lo sermant-latest.tar.gz https://github.com/sermant-io/Sermant/releases/latest/download/sermant-latest.tar.gz
tar xzf sermant-latest.tar.gz
```

upgrade.title: Update JVM arguments
upgrade.description: Point the `-javaagent` flag to the new Sermant version and restart your application.

resolution.summary: Sermant is installed as a Java agent for proxyless service mesh capabilities via bytecode enhancement.

prerequisites.description: Java 8+ and ZooKeeper are required. No Kubernetes cluster needed for basic usage.
